/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch i386 -arch x86_64 -mmacosx-version-min=10.7 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -msse2 -stdlib=libc++   -o ../../../../libOpenMMGroupConstraintReference.dylib -install_name /Users/luke/openmm/libOpenMMGroupConstraintReference.dylib CMakeFiles/OpenMMGroupConstraintReference.dir/src/ReferenceGroupConstraintKernelFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenMMGroupConstraintReference.dir/src/ReferenceGroupConstraintKernels.cpp.o ../../../../libOpenMM.dylib /usr/lib/libdl.dylib -lpthread
